headline: Bernard Arnault, a 'free-marketeer' who whispers in the ear of every president
subtitle: 'Bernard Arnault's Empire' (2/6). LVMH's boss has never hidden his allegiance to France's pro-business, establishment right. He's close to fellow billionaire Vincent Bolloré and, above all, pragmatic. Now he's preparing for the far right's rise to power.

US launches new strikes against Iran after Trump warns country will pay for deaths of American soldiers
subtitle: The United States launched a fresh round of attacks against Iran late on Monday in the tenth consecutive night of attacks. On Tuesday morning, Iran's Revolutionary guard said it had hit US military targets in Bahrain and Kuwait.

headline: Between China and the US, a new diplomacy of detainees emerges
subtitle: Alongside the major issues discussed between the world's two leading powers, the fate of American citizens imprisoned in China on espionage charges has also become a bargaining chip.

headline: Climate change: Why the ECB refuses to create a lower interest rate for green investments
subtitle: China's central bank guarantees low-cost funding for green investments. Its European counterpart, although a frontrunner on climate change, currently refuses to use this tool.

headline: Repeated heatwaves fuel eco-anxiety and anger among youth: 'It feels like we're living in a dystopia'
subtitle: In the wake of the third heatwave to hit France since May, frustration and anxiety have gripped part of the younger generations, faced with what some call 'the coolest summer of the rest of their lives.'

headline: In Paris café, terror attack survivors find community: 'People want to tell each other: I am alive'
subtitle: After long days attending the 2015 Paris attacks trial, survivors and relatives of victims met in a bar to comfort one another. They have continued to gather every month, joined by victims of other attacks, to share experiences, advice and, above all, laughter and good company.

headline: Inside the court of France's richest man, Bernard Arnault
subtitle: 'Bernard Arnault's Empire' (1/6). The billionaire at the head of LVMH is as secretive as he is powerful. He relies on a devoted entourage in which a mix of fear and admiration prevails.
